title: 「Only if」句型
titleZh: 「Only if 句：只有在……條件下才……」
titleEn: Using Only if to express a necessary condition

source.file: Sentence Structure 63 -「Only if 句：只有在……條件下才……」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Main clause + only if + condition clause

formulas.formula: Main clause + only if + condition clause
Only if + condition clause + auxiliary / modal verb + subject + main verb

example: We can leave earlier only if we have finished all our work.
exampleZh: 我們只有完成所有工作後，才可以早些離開。

examples.en: We can leave earlier only if we have finished all our work.
examples.zh: 我們只有完成所有工作後，才可以早些離開。
examples.highlight: only if we have finished all our work

examples.en: You may enter only if your name is on the list.
examples.zh: 只有你的名字在名單上，你才可以進入。
examples.highlight: only if your name is on the list

meaning.zh: Only if 引出一項必要條件；只有當該條件成立時，主句所述的事情才可能、獲准或成立。

rules.en: Only if introduces a necessary condition for the preceding result.
rules.zh: Only if 前面的事情要發生，後面的條件必須先成立；條件不成立時，結果便不可以發生。
examples: You may enter only if your name is on the list.

rules.en: When referring to the future, normally use the present tense in the if clause rather than will.
rules.zh: 即使意思與將來有關，only if 後面的 if 子句通常使用現在式，而不使用 will。
examples: We will go hiking only if the weather improves.

rules.en: When Only if begins the sentence, invert the auxiliary or modal verb and the subject in the main clause.
rules.zh: Only if 放在句首時，主句要使用倒裝，把助動詞或情態動詞放在主語之前。
examples: Only if your name is on the list may you enter.
Only if everyone agrees can we change the plan.

rules.en: Only if introduces a necessary condition; if only expresses a wish, regret or dissatisfaction.
rules.zh: Only if 表示「只有在……條件下才……」；if only 表示「要是……就好了／只可惜……」，兩者意思完全不同。
examples: I will buy the laptop only if the price falls.
If only I had enough money, I could go to Italy.

benefits.en: This structure tells the listener exactly what must happen before something is possible, allowed or accepted.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚告訴聽者，在某件事可以發生、獲准進行或獲得接受之前，甚麼條件必須成立。

benefits.en: You can use only if when explaining school rules, safety requirements, permissions and workplace procedures.
benefits.zh: 說明學校規則、安全要求、許可條件和工作程序時，可以使用 only if。

benefits.en: The structure makes it clear that the result cannot happen when the condition is missing.
benefits.zh: 這個句型清楚表明，如果缺少指定條件，相關結果便不可以發生。

benefits.en: Instead of always writing a negative sentence with unless, you can express the same restriction positively with only if.
benefits.zh: 你不需要每次都用 unless 寫否定句，也可以用 only if 以肯定形式表達相同限制。

benefits.en: Placing Only if at the beginning draws attention to the condition before giving the main message.
benefits.zh: 把 Only if 放在句首，可以先把讀者的注意力帶到重要條件，再說明主要訊息。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using only if to show a necessary condition.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 only if 改寫以下句子，以表達必要條件。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: You cannot enter the library without a valid card.
questions.promptZh: 沒有有效圖書證，你不能進入圖書館。
questions.answer: You may enter the library only if you have a valid card.
questions.answerZh: 你只有持有有效圖書證，才可以進入圖書館。
questions.highlight: You may enter the library only if you have a valid card.

questions.prompt: Mia can watch television after she finishes her homework, but not before.
questions.promptZh: 米婭完成家課後才可以看電視，之前不可以。
questions.answer: Mia can watch television only if she finishes her homework.
questions.answerZh: 米婭只有完成功課後，才可以看電視。
questions.highlight: Mia can watch television only if she finishes her homework.

questions.prompt: We will not go for a picnic unless the weather is dry.
questions.promptZh: 除非天氣乾爽，否則我們不會去野餐。
questions.answer: We will go for a picnic only if the weather is dry.
questions.answerZh: 只有天氣乾爽，我們才會去野餐。
questions.highlight: We will go for a picnic only if the weather is dry.

questions.prompt: Leo must wear a helmet before he is allowed to borrow the bicycle.
questions.promptZh: 里奧必須戴上頭盔，才獲准借用單車。
questions.answer: Leo may borrow the bicycle only if he wears a helmet.
questions.answerZh: 里奧只有戴上頭盔，才可以借用單車。
questions.highlight: Leo may borrow the bicycle only if he wears a helmet.

questions.prompt: The dog is allowed to go outside when the gate is closed, and not at any other time.
questions.promptZh: 大門關好時，狗才可以到外面去；其他時候不可以。
questions.answer: The dog can go outside only if the gate is closed.
questions.answerZh: 只有大門已關好，狗才可以到外面去。
questions.highlight: The dog can go outside only if the gate is closed.

questions.prompt: I do not buy this magazine unless it contains an article I need.
questions.promptZh: 除非這本雜誌有一篇我需要的文章，否則我不會購買。
questions.answer: I buy this magazine only if it contains an article I need.
questions.answerZh: 我只有在這本雜誌有一篇我需要的文章時，才會購買它。
questions.highlight: I buy this magazine only if it contains an article I need.

questions.prompt: A teacher must be present before students can use the computer room.
questions.promptZh: 必須有老師在場，學生才可以使用電腦室。
questions.answer: Students can use the computer room only if a teacher is present.
questions.answerZh: 只有老師在場，學生才可以使用電腦室。
questions.highlight: Students can use the computer room only if a teacher is present.

questions.prompt: Chloe will not join the walk unless her ankle feels better.
questions.promptZh: 除非克洛伊的腳踝好轉，否則她不會參加步行活動。
questions.answer: Chloe will join the walk only if her ankle feels better.
questions.answerZh: 只有腳踝好轉，克洛伊才會參加步行活動。
questions.highlight: Chloe will join the walk only if her ankle feels better.

questions.prompt: The shop does not give customers a refund unless they show the receipt.
questions.promptZh: 除非顧客出示收據，否則商店不會退款。
questions.answer: The shop gives customers a refund only if they show the receipt.
questions.answerZh: 只有顧客出示收據，商店才會退款。
questions.highlight: The shop gives customers a refund only if they show the receipt.

questions.prompt: The phone needs enough battery power before you can make a call.
questions.promptZh: 電話必須有足夠電量，你才可以撥打電話。
questions.answer: You can make a call only if the phone has enough battery power.
questions.answerZh: 只有電話有足夠電量，你才可以撥打電話。
questions.highlight: You can make a call only if the phone has enough battery power.

questions.prompt: Training cannot start until all the players have arrived.
questions.promptZh: 所有球員到達後，訓練才可以開始。
questions.answer: The team can start training only if all the players have arrived.
questions.answerZh: 只有所有球員都已到達，球隊才可以開始訓練。
questions.highlight: The team can start training only if all the players have arrived.

questions.prompt: Daniel will not drive us home if he is too tired.
questions.promptZh: 如果丹尼爾太疲倦，他便不會駕車送我們回家。
questions.answer: Daniel will drive us home only if he is not too tired.
questions.answerZh: 只有在不太疲倦的情況下，丹尼爾才會駕車送我們回家。
questions.highlight: Daniel will drive us home only if he is not too tired.

questions.prompt: Guests without the hotel wristband are not allowed to use the swimming pool.
questions.promptZh: 沒有酒店手帶的住客不可以使用泳池。
questions.answer: Guests may use the swimming pool only if they wear the hotel wristband.
questions.answerZh: 住客只有佩戴酒店手帶，才可以使用泳池。
questions.highlight: Guests may use the swimming pool only if they wear the hotel wristband.

questions.prompt: I will not order the soup if it is too spicy.
questions.promptZh: 如果這款湯太辣，我便不會點它。
questions.answer: I will order the soup only if it is not too spicy.
questions.answerZh: 只有這款湯不太辣，我才會點它。
questions.highlight: I will order the soup only if it is not too spicy.

questions.prompt: The printer cannot work without a network connection.
questions.promptZh: 沒有網絡連線，打印機便不能運作。
questions.answer: The printer works only if it is connected to the network.
questions.answerZh: 只有連接至網絡，打印機才可以運作。
questions.highlight: The printer works only if it is connected to the network.

questions.prompt: Sarah needs to bring photo identification before she can collect the parcel.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉必須攜帶附有相片的身分證明文件，才可以領取包裹。
questions.answer: Sarah can collect the parcel only if she brings photo identification.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉只有攜帶附有相片的身分證明文件，才可以領取包裹。
questions.highlight: Sarah can collect the parcel only if she brings photo identification.

questions.prompt: We cannot book the room unless it is still available.
questions.promptZh: 除非房間仍然可以預訂，否則我們不能預訂它。
questions.answer: We can book the room only if it is still available.
questions.answerZh: 只有房間仍然可以預訂，我們才可以預訂它。
questions.highlight: We can book the room only if it is still available.

questions.prompt: The nurse must wait until the wound has healed before removing the bandage.
questions.promptZh: 護士必須等到傷口癒合後，才可以拆除繃帶。
questions.answer: The nurse may remove the bandage only if the wound has healed.
questions.answerZh: 只有傷口已經癒合，護士才可以拆除繃帶。
questions.highlight: The nurse may remove the bandage only if the wound has healed.

questions.prompt: Do not press this button unless the machine stops unexpectedly.
questions.promptZh: 除非機器突然停止運作，否則不要按這個按鈕。
questions.answer: Press this button only if the machine stops unexpectedly.
questions.answerZh: 只有機器突然停止運作時，才按這個按鈕。
questions.highlight: Press this button only if the machine stops unexpectedly.

questions.prompt: The children must wait for a green traffic light before they may cross the road.
questions.promptZh: 孩子必須等待交通燈轉為綠色，才可以橫過馬路。
questions.answer: The children may cross the road only if the traffic light is green.
questions.answerZh: 只有交通燈轉為綠色，孩子才可以橫過馬路。
questions.highlight: The children may cross the road only if the traffic light is green.

questions.prompt: The school trip will be cancelled unless enough parents volunteer.
questions.promptZh: 除非有足夠家長自願協助，否則學校旅行將會取消。
questions.answer: The school trip will take place only if enough parents volunteer.
questions.answerZh: 只有足夠家長自願協助，學校旅行才會舉行。
questions.highlight: The school trip will take place only if enough parents volunteer.

questions.prompt: Customers must spend at least fifty dollars to receive the discount.
questions.promptZh: 顧客必須消費至少五十元，才可以獲得折扣。
questions.answer: Customers can receive the discount only if they spend at least fifty dollars.
questions.answerZh: 顧客只有消費至少五十元，才可以獲得折扣。
questions.highlight: Customers can receive the discount only if they spend at least fifty dollars.

questions.prompt: The match must stop unless the rain becomes lighter.
questions.promptZh: 除非雨勢減弱，否則比賽必須停止。
questions.answer: The match can continue only if the rain becomes lighter.
questions.answerZh: 只有雨勢減弱，比賽才可以繼續。
questions.highlight: The match can continue only if the rain becomes lighter.

questions.prompt: The company will not accept an application with any incomplete section.
questions.promptZh: 如果申請表有任何部分未填妥，公司便不會接受。
questions.answer: The company will accept an application only if all its sections are complete.
questions.answerZh: 只有申請表的所有部分都已填妥，公司才會接受申請。
questions.highlight: The company will accept an application only if all its sections are complete.

questions.prompt: The doctor must give approval before the patient is allowed to leave hospital.
questions.promptZh: 病人必須得到醫生批准，才可以離開醫院。
questions.answer: The patient may leave hospital only if the doctor gives approval.
questions.answerZh: 只有醫生批准，病人才可以離開醫院。
questions.highlight: The patient may leave hospital only if the doctor gives approval.

questions.prompt: The sensor must detect movement before the lights turn on.
questions.promptZh: 感應器必須偵測到移動，燈才會亮起。
questions.answer: The lights turn on only if the sensor detects movement.
questions.answerZh: 只有感應器偵測到移動，燈才會亮起。
questions.highlight: The lights turn on only if the sensor detects movement.

questions.prompt: The council will not open the shelter unless the temperature falls below five degrees Celsius.
questions.promptZh: 除非氣溫下降至攝氏五度以下，否則市議會不會開放庇護中心。
questions.answer: The council will open the shelter only if the temperature falls below five degrees Celsius.
questions.answerZh: 只有氣溫下降至攝氏五度以下，市議會才會開放庇護中心。
questions.highlight: The council will open the shelter only if the temperature falls below five degrees Celsius.

questions.prompt: Emma will not share the document unless everyone agrees to keep it private.
questions.promptZh: 除非所有人都同意把文件保密，否則艾瑪不會分享它。
questions.answer: Emma will share the document only if everyone agrees to keep it private.
questions.answerZh: 只有所有人都同意把文件保密，艾瑪才會分享它。
questions.highlight: Emma will share the document only if everyone agrees to keep it private.

questions.prompt: The lift cannot be used before the safety inspection is completed.
questions.promptZh: 安全檢查完成前，升降機不能使用。
questions.answer: The lift can be used only if the safety inspection has been completed.
questions.answerZh: 只有安全檢查已完成，升降機才可以使用。
questions.highlight: The lift can be used only if the safety inspection has been completed.

questions.prompt: Reliable new information is required before we will change the plan.
questions.promptZh: 我們必須得到可靠的新資料，才會更改計劃。
questions.answer: We will change the plan only if the new information is reliable.
questions.answerZh: 只有新資料可靠，我們才會更改計劃。
questions.highlight: We will change the plan only if the new information is reliable.

questions.prompt: Smoke entering the room was a necessary condition for the alarm to sound.
questions.promptZh: 煙霧進入房間是警報器響起的必要條件。
questions.answer: The alarm would sound only if smoke entered the room.
questions.answerZh: 只有煙霧進入房間，警報器才會響起。
questions.highlight: The alarm would sound only if smoke entered the room.

questions.prompt: The museum did not extend its opening hours unless a special exhibition was being held.
questions.promptZh: 除非當時正在舉行特別展覽，否則博物館不會延長開放時間。
questions.answer: The museum extended its opening hours only if a special exhibition was being held.
questions.answerZh: 只有當時正在舉行特別展覽，博物館才會延長開放時間。
questions.highlight: The museum extended its opening hours only if a special exhibition was being held.

questions.prompt: The manager did not approve overtime unless the work could not be completed the next day.
questions.promptZh: 除非工作不能留待翌日完成，否則經理不會批准逾時工作。
questions.answer: The manager approved overtime only if the work could not be completed the next day.
questions.answerZh: 只有工作不能留待翌日完成，經理才會批准逾時工作。
questions.highlight: The manager approved overtime only if the work could not be completed the next day.

questions.prompt: The device must be connected to Wi-Fi before the software saves a backup.
questions.promptZh: 裝置必須連接至 Wi-Fi，軟件才會儲存備份。
questions.answer: The software saves a backup only if the device is connected to Wi-Fi.
questions.answerZh: 只有裝置連接至 Wi-Fi，軟件才會儲存備份。
questions.highlight: The software saves a backup only if the device is connected to Wi-Fi.

questions.prompt: The rescue boat was not sent out unless the sea conditions were safe enough.
questions.promptZh: 除非海面情況足夠安全，否則救援船不會出動。
questions.answer: The rescue boat was sent out only if the sea conditions were safe enough.
questions.answerZh: 只有海面情況足夠安全，救援船才會出動。
questions.highlight: The rescue boat was sent out only if the sea conditions were safe enough.

questions.prompt: You must obtain permission from the people in these photographs before sharing them.
questions.promptZh: 你必須先得到相片中人物的同意，才可以分享這些相片。
questions.answer: You may share these photographs only if the people in them have given permission.
questions.answerZh: 只有相片中的人物已經同意，你才可以分享這些相片。
questions.highlight: You may share these photographs only if the people in them have given permission.

questions.prompt: If the school building can be used, the class will not move online.
questions.promptZh: 如果校舍可以使用，課堂便不會轉為網上進行。
questions.answer: The class will move online only if the school building cannot be used.
questions.answerZh: 只有校舍不能使用，課堂才會轉為網上進行。
questions.highlight: The class will move online only if the school building cannot be used.

questions.prompt: The payment cannot be released until both sides have signed the agreement.

questions.answer: The payment can be released only if both sides have signed the agreement.
questions.answerZh: 只有雙方都已簽署協議，款項才可以發放。
questions.highlight: The payment can be released only if both sides have signed the agreement.

questions.prompt: Do not take the medicine unless the pain returns.
questions.promptZh: 除非痛楚再次出現，否則不要服用這種藥物。
questions.answer: Take the medicine only if the pain returns.
questions.answerZh: 只有痛楚再次出現時，才服用這種藥物。
questions.highlight: Take the medicine only if the pain returns.

questions.prompt: Engineers must confirm that the bridge is safe before the road can reopen.
questions.promptZh: 工程師必須確認大橋安全，道路才可以重新開放。
questions.answer: The road can reopen only if engineers confirm that the bridge is safe.
questions.answerZh: 只有工程師確認大橋安全，道路才可以重新開放。
questions.highlight: The road can reopen only if engineers confirm that the bridge is safe.

questions.prompt: The research team will not publish the findings unless the results can be checked independently.
questions.promptZh: 除非研究結果可以由獨立人士核實，否則研究團隊不會發表調查結果。
questions.answer: The research team will publish the findings only if the results can be checked independently.
questions.answerZh: 只有研究結果可以由獨立人士核實，研究團隊才會發表調查結果。
questions.highlight: The research team will publish the findings only if the results can be checked independently.

questions.prompt: Residents are not allowed to return to the building without a safety declaration from the fire service.
questions.promptZh: 在消防部門宣布大樓安全之前，居民不可以返回大樓。
questions.answer: Residents can return to the building only if the fire service declares it safe.
questions.answerZh: 只有消防部門宣布大樓安全，居民才可以返回。
questions.highlight: Residents can return to the building only if the fire service declares it safe.

questions.prompt: The charity cannot begin the project without enough long-term funding.
questions.promptZh: 沒有足夠的長期資金，慈善機構便不能展開項目。
questions.answer: The charity can begin the project only if it receives enough long-term funding.
questions.answerZh: 只有獲得足夠的長期資金，慈善機構才可以展開項目。
questions.highlight: The charity can begin the project only if it receives enough long-term funding.

questions.prompt: The judge cannot consider the new evidence unless its source can be verified.
questions.promptZh: 除非新證據的來源可以得到核實，否則法官不能考慮該證據。
questions.answer: The judge may consider the new evidence only if its source can be verified.
questions.answerZh: 只有新證據的來源可以得到核實，法官才可以考慮該證據。
questions.highlight: The judge may consider the new evidence only if its source can be verified.

questions.prompt: A user must answer two security questions correctly before the system allows a password change.
questions.promptZh: 使用者必須正確回答兩條保安問題，系統才會允許更改密碼。
questions.answer: The system allows a password change only if the user answers two security questions correctly.
questions.answerZh: 只有使用者正確回答兩條保安問題，系統才會允許更改密碼。
questions.highlight: The system allows a password change only if the user answers two security questions correctly.

questions.prompt: The driver cannot move the bus until every passenger is seated.
questions.promptZh: 所有乘客坐好後，司機才可以開動巴士。
questions.answer: Only if every passenger is seated can the driver move the bus.
questions.answerZh: 只有所有乘客都已坐好，司機才可以開動巴士。
questions.highlight: Only if every passenger is seated can the driver move the bus.

questions.prompt: The new sports centre will not open unless it passes the final inspection.
questions.promptZh: 除非新體育中心通過最後檢查，否則不會開放。
questions.answer: Only if the new sports centre passes the final inspection will it open.
questions.answerZh: 只有新體育中心通過最後檢查，它才會開放。
questions.highlight: Only if the new sports centre passes the final inspection will it open.

questions.prompt: The timetable cannot be changed unless both departments agree.
questions.promptZh: 除非兩個部門都同意，否則時間表不能更改。
questions.answer: Only if both departments agree can the timetable be changed.
questions.answerZh: 只有兩個部門都同意，時間表才可以更改。
questions.highlight: Only if both departments agree can the timetable be changed.

questions.prompt: Do not use this second number unless the emergency line is busy.
questions.promptZh: 除非緊急熱線正在繁忙，否則不要使用這個後備號碼。
questions.answer: Only if the emergency line is busy should you use this second number.
questions.answerZh: 只有緊急熱線正在繁忙時，你才應該使用這個後備號碼。
questions.highlight: Only if the emergency line is busy should you use this second number.

questions.prompt: The hospital will not expand the programme unless the data show a clear benefit.
questions.promptZh: 除非數據顯示計劃有明顯成效，否則醫院不會擴大該計劃。
questions.answer: Only if the data show a clear benefit will the hospital expand the programme.
questions.answerZh: 只有數據顯示計劃有明顯成效，醫院才會擴大該計劃。
questions.highlight: Only if the data show a clear benefit will the hospital expand the programme.
